query:
SELECT st.`id` AS task_id, p.`id` AS product_id, p.`batchNo`, p.`serialNumber`, p.`imei`, p.`sheetRowNumber`
FROM `station_tasks` st
JOIN `products` p ON p.`id` = st.`productId`
WHERE st.`id` = 510865;
